TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Aud Brindley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 12, Aud Brindley, biru na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1957) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: au* ő≤rin*lej s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj **** , rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, au* ő≤rin*lej, ő≤iru na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Aud Brindley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 12, Aud Brindley, biru na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1957) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
